title: SOTN decomp work queue record
description: One JSON object per line in work/queue.jsonl. One record per target function.

build.description: Build target the function belongs to.

overlay.description: Overlay or binary the function lives in.

function.description: Function symbol name as it appears in the split output.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Only the scheduler writes this.

claimed_by.description: Worker identity that currently owns the record.

tier_reached.description: Highest escalation tier attempted. 0 Qwen, 1 cloud, 2 Haiku, 3 Sonnet, 4 Opus.

best_score.description: Best asm-differ match percentage observed. 100 means byte match.

worktree.description: Path to the git worktree for this function, relative to repo root.

notes.description: First divergence, suspected cause, and any handoff context.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last scheduler write.
